rationale.R1.3: The revised draft flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (the original overstated generality and downstream impact).
rationale.R1.4: The agent's score of 0.7 is too high; while the author did name one prior work, they did not articulate the delta.
rationale.RX.1: The revised draft marks uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., deployment in policy-evaluation settings).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no substantial drift from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The revised draft is harm-free, but with one minor regression (the original overstated generality and downstream impact).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the revised draft is annotated with source and reason.
